q1.question: How much does it cost?
q1.answer: €9-19 to contact the host (depending on city). One-time payment. No additional commissions. You only pay to unlock the contact, then you deal directly with the host.

q2.question: Why is it so cheap?
q2.answer: We don't charge commission to the host or percentage of the rent. We only charge for connecting you. That's why it's much cheaper than traditional agencies (€50-500) or platforms like Airbnb (15%).

q3.question: What do I get for €12?
q3.answer: Direct email of the host + pre-written message template + 48h response guarantee or money back. You contact directly, negotiate your conditions and close the deal without intermediaries.

q4.question: Does the host pay anything?
q4.answer: No. Zero commissions. The host doesn't pay anything. That's why prices are fairer - they don't need to inflate the rent to cover platform commissions.

q5.question: Is WiFi really verified?
q5.answer: Yes. All properties guarantee >50 Mbps WiFi, verified and suitable for remote work. We don't accept properties without good internet.

q6.question: What about cancellations?
q6.answer: You negotiate cancellation conditions directly with the host. Each host has their own policy. This gives you flexibility to reach agreements that suit both parties.

q7.question: What if the host doesn't respond?
q7.answer: We guarantee host response within 48 hours. If they don't respond, we refund 100% of your payment. No questions asked.

q8.question: Is payment secure?
q8.answer: Yes. We use Stripe, the same system used by Airbnb, Uber and thousands of companies. Bank-level encryption. Your data is always protected.

finalCta.title: Ready to find your home?
